properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v3 v4 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Open our eyes, Lord We want to see You Open our hearts, Lord We want to know You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Open our ears, Lord We need to hear You Jesus be revealed Jesus be revealed

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: God is here God is here God is here He is able We draw near To see Jesus face to face

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: God is here God is here God is here He is faithful We draw near to see Jesus Oh Jesus be revealed

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Open the gates, Lord Reveal Your glory Open the nations Establish Your Kingdom

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Open the Heavens Pour out Your Spirit Jesus be revealed Jesus be revealed

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Holy We cry holy Hallelujah God is here
